rationale: The proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §26.008 governs parental access to student information. The two provisions address unrelated subjects with no operative overlap.
quote: Sec. 26.008. RIGHT TO FULL INFORMATION CONCERNING STUDENT. (a) Except as provided by Section 38.004, a parent is entitled to:
_note: No conflict. The rule text addresses parental rights to student information; the proposed change modifies a property tax exemption amount. No cross-reference or dependency exists between the two provisions.
